contract_meta.phase_name: Safe Dependency Install & Test Command Detection
contract_meta.rationale: src/runner/runInSandbox.ts:19-24 always runs 'npm test' without ensuring dependencies are installed or selecting an appropriate test command. This causes flaky runs on fresh projects and misses safety best practices (running installs with --ignore-scripts). There is no pre-run check for node_modules or package.json scripts. Implementing installDeps (with --ignore-scripts, timeout, logging) and detectTestCommand (read package.json scripts.test, fallback to sensible defaults) will improve determinism and safety. Tests will mock spawn to verify behavior without network access.

project.name: executor-mvp
project.goal: Ensure tests run reliably by auto-installing dependencies safely and selecting the correct test command per project.
project.scope: Add installDeps.ts, detectTestCommand.ts, integrate into runInSandbox, unit tests

execution_model.description: Add safe install + command detection with tests

observability.description: Trace when installs are triggered and which command runs

actions.cmd: test -f src/runner/runInSandbox.ts && echo exists || echo missing

tasks.title: Win #44: Add safe installDeps
tasks.description: Implement installDeps.ts to detect node_modules and run 'npm ci --ignore-scripts' with timeout and logging.

exports: export async function ensureDependencies(projectRoot: string, timeoutMs?: number): Promise<{installed:boolean, command:string|null}>
content_spec.logic: If package.json exists and node_modules missing, run npm ci --ignore-scripts; capture exit code; respect timeout; return {installed, command}

actions.content_spec: Mock spawn; verify ci called when node_modules missing; verify skip when present; verify ignore-scripts flag present

tasks.title: Win #45: Add detectTestCommand
tasks.description: Implement detectTestCommand.ts to read package.json scripts.test and fallback (jest/vitest/node --test).

content_spec.logic: Read package.json; if scripts.test exists use 'npm test'; else if devDeps include vitest use 'vitest run'; else if jest use 'jest'; else 'node --test'

actions.content_spec: Create temp dirs with different package.json combos; assert detection

tasks.title: Win #46: Integrate into runInSandbox
tasks.description: Update runInSandbox to call ensureDependencies and run detected command; add environment CI=1; log actions.

actions.content_spec: Import ensureDependencies and detectTestCommand; optionally install; choose command; set CI=1; include install logs into output
Mock filesystem + spawn: assert install invoked when needed and command switched

success_criteria: Runner installs deps safely when needed

release_actions.cmd: git commit -m "feat(4B2): safe install and test command detection in sandbox"

ai_executor_guidelines.win_isolation: Add helpers with tests before integrating
